mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_buyer_credit_policy (tenant_id, seller_company_id, buyer_company_id, credit_limit_amount, status) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{sellerCompanyId}, #{buyerCompanyId}, #{creditLimitAmount}, #{status})

INSERT INTO tb_buyer_credit_ledger (tenant_id, seller_company_id, buyer_company_id, txn_type, amount, balance_after, ref_table, ref_id, memo, created_by) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{sellerCompanyId}, #{buyerCompanyId}, #{txnType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refTable}, #{refId}, #{memo}, #{createdBy})

INSERT INTO tb_buyer_advance_ledger (tenant_id, seller_company_id, buyer_company_id, txn_type, amount, balance_after, ref_table, ref_id, memo, created_by) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{sellerCompanyId}, #{buyerCompanyId}, #{txnType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refTable}, #{refId}, #{memo}, #{createdBy})
